topic: A technician performing a 'Three-Point Bend' test on a carbon fiber sample.
raw_generation:
{
  "script": "SHOT 1: INT. LAB BENCH – DAY. A technician positions a carbon fiber sample on a three-point bending fixture.
TEXT ON SCREEN: L, b
SHOT 2: INT. LAB BENCH – DAY. The technician centers the indenter on the sample and aligns the fixture with precision.
TEXT ON SCREEN: d
SHOT 3: INT. LAB BENCH – DAY. The indenter loads the span, bending the sample while a readout captures Pmax.
TEXT ON SCREEN: Pmax",
  "narration": "In a controlled laboratory setting, a technician performs a meticulous three-point bend test on a carbon fiber specimen. The camera isolates the technician as steady hands operate the fixture, align the indenter, and monitor a quiet readout that records how the material deflects under load. The scene emphasizes precision and the material’s stiffness and failure behavior, conveyed through calm focus, clean geometry, and a data-driven mood."
}

parsed_generation.script:
SHOT 1: INT. LAB BENCH – DAY. A technician positions a carbon fiber sample on a three-point bending fixture.
TEXT ON SCREEN: L, b
SHOT 2: INT. LAB BENCH – DAY. The technician centers the indenter on the sample and aligns the fixture with precision.
TEXT ON SCREEN: d
SHOT 3: INT. LAB BENCH – DAY. The indenter loads the span, bending the sample while a readout captures Pmax.

parsed_generation.narration: In a controlled laboratory setting, a technician performs a meticulous three-point bend test on a carbon fiber specimen. The camera isolates the technician as steady hands operate the fixture, align the indenter, and monitor a quiet readout that records how the material deflects under load. The scene emphasizes precision and the material’s stiffness and failure behavior, conveyed through calm focus, clean geometry, and a data-driven mood.

feedback: The script sticks to the technician performing a three-point bend on a carbon fiber sample and presents clear procedural shots. To improve, tighten the narration to emphasize explicit test steps and specimen orientation, and add a couple of varied camera angles to convey scale and deformation. Also streamline on-screen text to be concise and match the action-first style of the references.
strengths: Strong focus on instrumentation and data capture
fixes: Add an establishing wide shot of the fixture and sample for orientation
Use more explicit, concise on-screen labels for dimensions/load stages to align with reference style
